title: The Martial Artist
overview: When MMA rising star Ibby 'The Prince' Bakran shines in a local fight, the world’s largest promotion company offers him a deal he can’t refuse.  Now aligned with the sport’s top developing athletes, Ibby has a clear path to becoming great.
